edus.text: What can you tell me about VA Blue Button?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: I mean, what can VA Blue Button do to help me with my data?.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: VA Blue Button is a feature of the health management portal within My HealtheVet. It lets you view, print, save, download, and share information from your VA medical record and personal health record.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Ok. And what if I want to add information to my health record?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Simply click on Track Health in the blue navigation menu at the top of the page. You'll go to a new page where you can choose to record information like your vital signs, health history, goals, and food and exercise efforts.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Ah, haven't seen this before. Thank you. And what conditions do I need to fulfill to qualify for using all features of VA Blue Button?

edus.text: Yes, I am.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Are you registered as a patient in a VA health facility?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Yes. I'm currently registered as a patient and treated in one.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: In that case you can use all the features of this tool.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Are there things I need to consider when it comes to retirement benefits planning?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes there are. A good place to start is to figure out which age works best for you to start receiving your benefits. Have you considered that yet?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: No, I have not given much thought as to what age will work best for me. Can you provide me with assistance on this?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Are there things that can't be ruled out in regards to making decisions about your future?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes, many unforseen circumstances can occur like a car accident, so your final decision may have to be based on your "best guess."
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: So anything unexpected like accidents and health problems should be taken into consideration?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes, that is correct.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Is there an age that is considered the best to start your benefits?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: No there isn't a "one age suits all" scenario. It is ultimately up to you and your informed decision based on your individual needs and circumstances.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Is there someone I should contact if I decide to start delaying when I start my benefits?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes, you would need to contact Social Security 3 months before you turn 65 so that you can look into applying for Medicare.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Should I still look into whether I need to sign up for Medicare if I still have health insurance through my former employer?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes, you should look into this because some health insurance plans change automatically when you turn 65.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: If my earnings reach a certain amount, will I have to give up my benefits?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes, you may have to give up some of your benefits.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Once you have your insurance, the insurance company must show proof of insurance.

edus.text: 1 or 2 names on a registration registrants.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What kind of insurance do I need to register my vehicle?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: New York law requires that you have auto liability insurance coverage with a minimun amount of liability coverage of $10,000 for property damage for a single accident.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Can there be 2 different names in the vehicle registration?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: There can only be 1 or 2 names on a registration registrants. Fill and sign the form Vehicle Registration/Title Application PDF  MV-82 and provide their proofs of identity and date of birth. Both names must appear on the Insurance ID Card.

edus.text: how can I get a low-interest loan to help cover the cost of college?

edus.text: how can I be eligible?

edus.text: If the total loan amount you receive over the course of your education reaches the aggregate loan limit, you are not eligible to receive additional loans. However, if you repay some of your loans to bring your outstanding loan debt below the aggregate loan limit,  you could then borrow again, up to the amount of your remaining eligibility under the aggregate loan limit.

edus.text: I'm confused about an inspection. Do I need a Diesel Opacity Emissions inspection for my vehicle that is driven mainly in NY, but is registered in New Jersey?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: No, you don't need one because it's an out of state vehicle.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I heard there were random inspections at roadside stations. What happens if it fails?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: If that happens, a traffic ticket may be issued.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Can I get other types of inspections at inspection stations?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: It depends. If the vehicle needs the diesel emissions inspection, then they can't do any other inspections. Other than that though, the station can do other types of inspections.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I need to know where the diesel inspection happens, and also when does it happen?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Any diesel inspection station can do this. It happens at the annual safety inspection.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: So if I have an expired inspection certificate, what do I do?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Is the vehicle outside the DEMA?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Yes, it is.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You can go to the DMV to apply for a VS-1078 which is a Temporary Waiver. It needs to be displayed on the vehicle next to the original safety certificate.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What about if I want to become an inspection station? What would I need?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You need a DMV approved smokemeter. For more information, you should call 1-518-474-0919.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What are the criteria for if the vehicle needs a OBDII inspection versus the emissions inspection?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: If the vehicle weighs less than 8501 pounds, and was made in 1997 or newer, these get the OBDII and not the emissions inspection.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Can you please give me some information on the Direct PLUS Loan application for graduate students?

edus.text: Do you need to know what the Direct PLUS Loan application for graduate students is?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I do.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: This application is a request for supplemental information in connection with your application for a Federal Direct PLUS Loan Direct PLUS Loan through the Willam D. Ford Federal Direct Loan Direct Loan Program.  Some schools may have different processes for obtaining the additional information needed to process your application.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Have you placed a security freeze on your credit file?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I have placed a freeze on my credit file.  Will that be an issue?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: If you have placed a freeze on your credit file, you must life or remove it at each credit bureau before you can continue with this process.  Your application will not be processed if you have a security freeze.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Can I apply for a PLUS Loan online?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You can, and as with anything else on the web, you just go to the website and log in to start and then you would start the demo.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What must I do before I can receive a Direct PLUS Loan?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Before you can receive a Direct PLUS Loan, you must complete a Direct PLUS Loan Master Promissory Note Direct PLUS Loan MPN, which explains all of the terms and conditions of the loan and constitutes your legally binding agreement to repay all loans that you receive under the Direct PLUS Loan MPN.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What happens with the information that I enter for the application?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: The information that you provide will be sent to the school you select to use to determine your eligibility for a Direct PLUS Loan and to process your application.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What loan types are available for deferment?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: The loans available for deferment are Direct Loan, FFEL Program Loan, and Perkins Loan Borrowers.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Did you receive a Perkins Loan?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Yes, I currently have a Perkins Loan.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Then you may be eligible for a deferment while you are working toward a cancellation on your Perkins Loan.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What if I no longer meet the deferment eligibility requirements?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You actually can receive a six month post deferment grace period.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What will happen if my deferment is not approved and I stop paying?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Your loan will be considered delinquent and will probably go into default.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What should I do if I can't make a payment for my student loan?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: It is in your best interest to call your student loan service immediately when you are having trouble making your payment.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What happens with an In-School deferment?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: In-school deferments are generally automatic so you really do not have to complete a request for it.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I came here looking for information on medicare premiums. Perhaps you can help me out.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Of course. The law requires an adjustment to your monthly Medicare Part B medical insurance and Medicare prescription drug coverage premiums. This affects less than five percent of people with Medicare. Most people don't pay higher premiums.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Well, that's interesting. What can you tell me about monthly medicare premiums in 2020?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: The standard Part B premium for 2020 is $ 144.60.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Are you single and filed an individual tax return, or married and filed a joint tax return?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: No, to both. I didn't file a tax return yet.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: What if I earn a lot less money now and fulfill the requirements for a new decision?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: In that case we need to see documentation verifying the event and the reduction in your income. The documentation you provide should relate to the event and may include a death certificate, a letter from your employer about your retirement, or something similar.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: How can I find more information about what Medicare covers?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Simply visit the Medicare website, or call 1-800-MEDICARE 1-800-633-4227;  TTY 1-877-486-2048. Your State Health Insurance Counseling and Assistance Program SHIP also can help answer your Medicare questions.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I'll visit the website, alright. Is there anything I should know if you are still using my 2017 tax year data?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: If you filed a return for tax year 2018 or did not need to file a tax return for tax year 2018, call us or visit any local Social Security office. We'll update our records.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Hi. I'm a veteran and I was wondering how I would get my payment for the benefits for degree?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: We issue the payments after each month's classes, that means you'll get the payment for november classes in december, for example.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Are you under the benefit of the post-9/11 GI bill?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Yes. I was selected for that benefit, it got anything in particular.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: For the post-9/11 gi bill, we pay for tuition and fees directly to the school and the money for books is send to you at the beginning of the term.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Got it. Now, what about the rates for the payments? It depends on the school or something?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: The payment rates depends on the school or institution of higher learning like a 4-years university, community college or graduate school.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: And how much you will pay me?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: The schools or institutions decides how to rate each hour, and we will pay you the full-tie rate.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: It's possible to take classes on more than one school with the benefit?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes, you can take classes at more than one school, as long as the classes at both schools counts toward your degree and this be a requirement of the first school in order to get your degree.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: This benefits only works for me? It can't go for anyone on my family too?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: It can work for you as a veteran, service member or on a qualified dependent.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: what can I do to avoid default?

edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: what happens after I miss a payment or two?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Your loan will be delinquent and late fees may be assessed. Even if you are delinquent on your loan, you may still be able to avoid default, so it’s important that you contact your loan servicer immediately.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: And what can I use as proof of ownership for a trailer model 1976?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: for that case, you can use either the NY State Certificate of Title (original or a certified copy) or a acceptable proof of ownership from any other state.

edus.text: Ok, now I need to know about the proof of ownership for snowmobiles purchased from a dealer.

edus.text: for snowmobiles purchased from a dealer, you can use as proof of ownership the Manufacturer's Certificate of Origin or the Manufacturer's Statement of Origin. There are some more options.

edus.text: What in case the owner dies. How does the transfer go?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: In case the owner is deceased, the Estates , Powers & Trust Law of New York State takes care of providing for the transfer but only through the property distribution of an estate set up by a Surrogate Court. The surviving Spouse, minor shield or next kin can't assume the ownership automatically.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: If your name had changed and you are looking for a refund, bring the plates with you to the DMV office when surrendering. Yu must request a transfer receipt and not a refund receipt. You then send these to the address that you'll find on the Request for Refund MV-215 form

edus.text: How is my refund actually determined?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: When you registered your plates, you paid $137.50, which was for two years. This amount included $62.50, which was the registration fee for two years, that is $31.25 per year. Also included was $50.00 for the title certificate and then $25.00 for the vehicle plates. The registration fee for one year is refunded to you, as you surrendered the plates during the first year of registration
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: If the person who registered a vehicle dies, is a refund possible?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: If a person dies, a refund for the registration of the vehicle is issued to the estate of the person by the DMV. The plates must be surrendered at the DMV office and a transfer receipt requested instead of a refund receipt
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Wat happens if the registration sticker belonging to the deceased is attached to the windshield or the vehicle plate of the vehicle in question?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: If the registration sticker of the deceased is attached to the windshield or vehicle plate of the registered vehicle, it can not be removed a refund applied for
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I am looking to make a Student Loan Payment, is this an easy process and what is involved?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: This is indeed an easy process, you make a payment to your Student Loan at any time, you need to contact your federal loan servicer to get this process started
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Do you know where to send payments to regarding your student loan?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I think I do, but is there anything else I should know?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Your Student Loan is handled by your student loan servicer. They will help you if you wish to make a payment to the loan
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Is there any advantage to having a Direct Loan in relation to making payments?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: If you have a Direct Loan, you can avail of a 0.25% interest rate deduction if you make payments by way of an automated direct debit
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Is that a bonus that is unique to Direct Loans?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes, as mentioned, this bonus is there for those who make payments to their Direct Loan by way of automated direct debits
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Is the process for making payments different if I have a Great Lakes or Nelnet loan?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: The process is basically the same as any loan, payments are now being accepted for Great Lakes and Nelnet loans. You can find more information on this on your account dashboard
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Is there any other way for me to make a payment to my Great Lakes or Nelnet loan?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: It could happen that we are unable to accept a payment from you, due to your account status. You can make payments on your servicer's website, to do this you will need to log in to your Great Lakes or Nelnet account
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Hey, how can I keep my personal information safe?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Identity theft affects millions of people each year and can cause serious financial and identity-related problems. Protect yourself by securing your personal information, taking the time to understand the threat of identity theft, and exercising caution.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: How can I protect myself from fraud?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Social Security is diligently working at national, regional, and local levels to combat the fraud that undermines our mission to serve the American public.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Should I report suspicious activity, such as scams?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Did you receive a suspicious call from someone claiming to be from Social Security?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: No, luckily I did not.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: How do I know what benefits I qualify for?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: We can help ensure you get the retirement benefits you should by reviewing the basics like how we determine your benefit amount and who else in your family might be eligible. Visit our Learn About Retirement Benefits page to make sure you know the basics of retirement benefits.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What should I do if something major changes in my life? Am I supposed to report that to you?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes, letting us know ensures your benefits and information is kept up to date. Remember to tell us whenever there s a change in your life circumstance that could affect your benefits.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I want to know what I have to pay
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Do you need information about the driver responsibility assessment?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: no
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Would you like to know why you must pay?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: no I know that I got the fines
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Would you like to know how much you have to pay?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: yes
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: The amount will depend on the type of violation or the total number of points on your driving record.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: can I check if my license is ok and you haven't suspended it or anything?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You can check by signing up for MyDMV if you haven't done so yet and using the account to check.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: what do I do when I receive the first annual assessment statement?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: When you receive the first annual assessment statement, you can pay the annual assessment, or you can pay the total assessment for the three year period.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What origianl documents do I need to apply for a noncitizen adult social security card
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You need to prove you immigration status
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: your need origianl documents prooving you U.S. immigration status
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I have premission to work from the department of homeland security DHS
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: I have a foreign birth certificate
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: We consider other documents such as your passport or a document 9issued by DHS as evidence of your age
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Do I need to be interviewed by social security
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Anyone age 12 or older requesting an original social security number must be interviewed by social security
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Can I get assigned a number if its for non work purposes?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes but you can not use it to work
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I need a number for general assistance benefits
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You must bring us a letter from the government agency for benefits and it must be on letterhead stationery and specifically identify you as the applicant
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I'm looking for information about how to enjoy benefits for Veterans.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: For that', you'll have to meet certain criteria.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Oh, i see. And what can i do in order to know if i meet those criteria?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Well, for starters, you better gather documents and information that you'll need to apply for education benefits, along with the information of the benefits you'll get in your future school.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What other means can i use to apply for these benefits?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You can apply via mail. First, request an application form from us. Then fill it and mail it to the Veterans Affairs processing office, near you location or school.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: And if instead, i choose to do all this in person, can i go?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Totally. Just go to a Veterans Affairs regional benefits office and enlist the help from a employee there.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: You said before that i would need to gather some documentation, didn't you?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: That's right. In order to prepare for any contingency, is better for you to start gathering certain documents and information that cold be useful in the process.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Are you also interested on applying for the so called Chapter 31 or Chapter 36?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: No, i don't have any interest on those for now, thanks.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Hello, how can I lower or suspend my aid payments?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: We will give you all the advice to carry out your procedures successfully.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Can you give me the advice?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: The person in charge of processing your data is the federal loan administrator.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What is the IDR plan?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You must first request the IDR plan.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: How can I change the payment plan based on income please?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Applies if you meet an increase in family size or a decrease in income.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Can you explain more what you just said?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: They are based on your income, in addition to your convenience.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You can also estimate your monthly payments using Loan Simulator.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I want to apply for Social Security benefits
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You can apply online, it is the quickest and easiest way to do it
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: We also provide ways if you are hearing impaired. Are you deaf or hard of hearing?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: yes I am deaf
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: you can call TTY 1-800-325-0778 to apply
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: and maybe i'll do it online
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes, you can just do it online
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: does my age decide when my benefits start?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: If you are already age 62 ,you may be able to start your benefits in the month you apply .You should apply for benefits no more than four months before the date you want your benefits to start .Benefits are paid the month after they are due
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: and if I get benefits can I get them through direct deposit?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes, just bring your bank information so you can sign up for Direct Deposit .If you do not have a bank account you can sign up for the Direct Express card program
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: what if I can't get my birth certificate?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: you can request one from the state where you were born
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: can I apply from outside the U.S. ?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: If you do not live in the U.S. or one of its territories you can Contact the nearest U.S. Social Security office , U.S. Embassy or consulate .
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Are there things that I should consider when comparing schools and deciding which school I wish to attend?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Have you done much research into the colleges and career schools that may be on your list?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: No, not yet, I have only started this process
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Is there anywhere I can go to find out of there have been any previous complaints made about a school?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You have a few options: you can contact your local Better Business Bureau, your state higher education agency or you could also check with the consumer protection division of your state attorney general's office. Another way to check is to make an enquiry with the agency that licences or accredits the school to see if it meets the required standards that are expected
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Is there any way for me to research schools by actually attending them in person?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Most schools organize college fairs, which gives you the opportunity to talk to representatives from lots of different colleges. One example of a college fair is organized by the National Association for College Administration for College Admission Counseling
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: When doing research on colleges, I would like to see if there have been any complaints made about the school. Is it easy to access this information?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You have a few options: you can contact your local Better Business Bureau, your state higher education agency or you could also check with the consumer protection division of your state attorney general's office. Another way to check is to make an enquiry with the agency that licences or accredits the school to see if it meets the required standards that are expected
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Is there any homework that I should do to help me choose a school?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: We always advise everyone to assess themselves. It's very important that everyone knows and understands their career goals and options and what their earning potential is. Knowing this information will help with selecting the appropriate school. The Career Search helps to match your skills and interests with potential future careers
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I need some information about getting my Social Security direct deposited in my account.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Do you receive SSI benefits and have a bank account?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Yes to both.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text:
You can sign up for Direct Deposit by doing one of the following:
- starting or changing Direct Deposit online Social Security benefits only
- contacting your bank, credit union or savings and loan association
- calling Social Security toll-free at 1-800-772-1213
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What if I have a credit union instead?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes it is possible to sign up through them.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: I've chosen an account type, what do I do next?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Let a representative at your financial institution know that you are interested in signing up to receive your benefits by Direct Deposit.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Yeah, what if I need a bank account?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You must open an account before you can sign up for Direct Deposit. You should shop around in your area to find an account that has the features you want at a price you can afford.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Is there a number I can call for the card?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes, all the toll-free Direct Express hotline at 1-800-333-1795. Also, Social Security can help you sign up.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Hello, I have some questions and I hope you have answers for me.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Would you like to know more about the course?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: No, I already know a lot about the course.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Would you like to know more about point reduction?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: No, I have read about this too.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Would you like to know more about insurance reduction then?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Yes! That sounds good.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Have you completed the PIRP course?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Yes, I have completed it.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: By the way, do youthful drivers in the assigned risk pool get an insurance premium discount?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Yes. Any insured driver who is the principal operator and completes a Point & Insurance Reduction Program course will receive the reduction.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Great. Where can I find more information on where to attend a course?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Simply consult your local telephone book under "Driving Instruction" or equivalent sections. You may also contact one of the program sponsors presented in the DMV publication, "List of Course Sponsors" (C-31), available at any state or county motor vehicle office and by request from DMV Call Center. The information is also available on the department website : dmv.ny.gov.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Hello. I was wondering about what is going on at a hearing. Can you explain this to me, please?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Of course. You and the judge will have a conversation. The judge will listen to your testimony and may ask you a few questions.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What if I have someone else with me?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: A representative may help you at the hearing.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Good, I will bring my grandson with me. He's a good boy. By the way, can I do anything about a board decision? There's one I don't quite agree with.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: Do you disagree with the Board's decision and have new and relevant evidence that supports your case?
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: Yes, I do. Very much.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: In that case you can file a Supplemental Claim. You can also appeal to the U.S. Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: And which options do I have to appeal a judge?
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: If you want a Veterans Law Judge to review your case as quickly as possible,  you should choose a Direct Review.
edus.speaker: agent

edus.text: What if I have new evidence? My grandson helped me gather information that can be presented to support my claim.
edus.speaker: user

edus.text: You have the option to add new evidence for a judge to review. You'll have to submit this evidence within 90 days from the date VA receives your Board Appeal form.
edus.speaker: agent
